nasb.text: If it is pleasing to the king, let it be decreed that they be destroyed, and I will pay ten thousand talents of silver into the hands of those who carry on the king’s business, to put into the king’s treasuries.”

esv.text: If it please the king, let it be decreed that they be destroyed, and I will pay 10,000 talents of silver into the hands of those who have charge of the king’s business, that they may put it into the king’s treasuries.”

cnv.text: 王若是贊成，請王降旨消滅他們；我願捐出三十四萬公斤銀子，交在管理國務的人手中，納入王庫。”

ccb.text: 王若愿意，就请降旨消灭他们。我愿捐三百四十五吨银子交给管理国事的人，纳入王的库房。”
